cves.description: A vulnerability was found in PX4 PX4-Autopilot up to 1.16.0. Affected by this issue is the function MavlinkLogHandler::state_listing/MavlinkLogHandler::log_entry_from_id of the file src/modules/mavlink/mavlink_log_handler.cpp. The manipulation results in stack-based buffer overflow. The attack is only possible with local access. The patch is identified as 338595edd1d235efd885fd5e9f45e7f9dcf4013d. It is best practice to apply a patch to resolve this issue.

llm_verdict.reasoning: The blamed commit introduced the `LOG_FILEPATH_SIZE` macro and used it to declare the `filepath` buffer in `state_listing` and `log_entry_from_id`, directly leading to the buffer overflow vulnerability when `sscanf` reads more than 255 characters into this buffer.
